title: Hiring forms
description: Practice understanding of W-4 and I-9 form, their impact, and what qualifies for proof of identity vs proof of eligibility for employment.

assessment_items.question_content:
When you get hired at a new job, your employer will ask you to fill out a W-4 form.

**What is the purpose of this form?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: to determine if you are allowed to work in the U.S.
to prove you are who you say you are
to help your employer determine how much tax to withhold
to help you choose your benefits

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the name of the form you fill out to let your employer know how much tax to take from your pay?**


[[☃ radio 1]]

When you get hired at a new job, your employer will ask you to fill out a W-4 form.

**Which of the following is something that a W-4 form specifically asks you to provide?**


[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: your yearly Health Savings Account (HSA) contribution

assessment_items.question_content:
Part of your hiring paperwork will include filling out an I-9 form. 

**What does an I-9 form specifically ask you to provide?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: proof of your eligibility to work in the U.S

assessment_items.question_content:
Part of your hiring paperwork will include filling out an I-9 form. 

**What is the main purpose of an I-9 form?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: to verify your identity and eligibility to work in the U.S
to declare the number of allowances for tax withholding

assessment_items.question_content:
Part of your hiring paperwork will include filling out an I-9 form. 

**What information is required on an I-9 form?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: your marital status and number of children you have

assessment_items.question_content:
Filling out an I-9 form requires that you attach documents that prove your identity and eligibility to work.

**Which document could you provide as proof of identity for an I-9 form?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Filling out an I-9 form requires that you attach documents that prove your identity and eligibility to work.

**Which of these can be used as proof of identity when completing an I-9 form?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Filling out an I-9 form requires that you attach documents that prove your identity and eligibility to work.

**What qualifies as proof of identity on an I-9 form?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

To get a job in the United States, you will need to provide specific documents that prove you are allowed to work. This requirement is part of the I-9 form.

**Which document would meet this requirement?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

To get a job in the United States, you will need to provide specific documents that prove you are allowed to work. This requirement is part of the I-9 form.

**What document would be accepted as proof of your eligibility to work in the U.S. according to the I-9 form?**

To get a job in the United States, you will need to provide specific documents that prove you are allowed to work. This requirement is part of the I-9 form.

**Which of the following documents can show you're eligible to work in the U.S. for an I-9 form?**
